## Checklist

- [ ] Docs/specs were updated before user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for the changed behavior.
- [ ] CLI help/OpenAPI/generated docs were regenerated when relevant.
- [ ] Compatibility impact was considered for CLI JSON, dump format, SQLite schema, API, Web UI, reports, and release artifacts.
- [ ] Sensitive dump data is not included in public artifacts.
